headline: Kilian Sardella
body: 🥶 Kilian Sardella’s injury has significantly cooled VfL Wolfsburg’s interest. RSCA Sacha Tavolieri (sachatavolieri) 🟢🐺 EXCL – VfL Wolfsburg push to sign Killian Sardella! 🇧🇪 The Belgian defender is in advanced talks with the Wolves, who have already presented him with a significant salary offer. 🟣 RSCA keen to extend Sardella’s contract, but his current financial demands are considered too high. JPL mercato —
raw_text:
🥶 Kilian Sardella’s injury has significantly cooled VfL Wolfsburg’s interest. #RSCA


Sacha Tavolieri (@sachatavolieri)

🟢🐺 EXCL – VfL Wolfsburg push to sign Killian Sardella!

🇧🇪 The Belgian defender is in advanced talks with the Wolves, who have already presented him with a significant salary offer.

🟣 RSCA keen to extend Sardella’s contract, but his current financial demands are considered too high. #JPL #mercato





— https://nitter.net/sachatavolieri/status/2074817100044963973#m
